description_long: This object consists of two metal wrenches, a hexagonal nut, and a matching bolt, all arranged side by side. The wrenches are of different sizes, each with open ends and one with a closed ring end, both featuring a robust, industrial design. The surfaces are smooth and metallic, with a dark, matte finish that suggests they are made of steel or a similar alloy. The nut and bolt are hexagonal and threaded, designed to fit together and be manipulated by the wrenches. There are no visible brand markings or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian, functional appearance. The set is typical of tools found in urban garages, workshops, or maintenance kits.
description: A set of two dark metal wrenches, a hex nut, and a bolt, all with a smooth, matte finish and industrial design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing both wrenches, the nut, and the bolt clearly laid out side by side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness and profile of the wrenches, with the bolt and nut visible between them.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the open and closed ends of the wrenches, with the nut and bolt standing upright.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flatness of the wrenches and the alignment of the nut and bolt.
